all.en: Dear Mr. Harrison,
all.zh: 親愛的哈里森先生：

all.en: I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction with the service I received during my recent stay at the Grandview Plaza Hotel from May 8 to May 12.
all.zh: 我寫此信是為了正式表達我對最近於 5 月 8 日至 5 月 12 日入住君景廣場飯店期間所獲服務的不滿。

all.en: My reservation was made under confirmation number GP-48217 for a business trip arranged by my company, Meridian Consulting Group.
all.zh: 我的訂房確認編號為 GP-48217，是由我的公司 Meridian Consulting Group 所安排的商務出差。

all.en: Although I have been a loyal member of your Platinum Rewards Program for over six years, this visit fell considerably short of the standards I have come to expect.
all.zh: 雖然我已是貴飯店白金會員方案逾六年的忠實會員，但這次入住的水準遠不如我一向所期待的標準。

all.en: Upon arrival, I was informed at the front desk that the executive suite I had reserved was no longer available due to an alleged overbooking.
all.zh: 抵達時，我在櫃台被告知所訂的行政套房因據稱超額訂房而無法提供。

all.en: I was subsequently relocated to a standard room on the third floor, which was significantly smaller and lacked the workspace essential to my business activities.
all.zh: 我隨後被安置到三樓的標準客房，房間明顯較小，且缺乏我商務活動所必需的工作空間。

all.en: To make matters worse, the air conditioning in the room malfunctioned throughout the first two nights, making it nearly impossible to sleep.
all.zh: 更糟的是，房內的空調在前兩晚持續故障，幾乎讓我無法入睡。

all.en: Despite three separate calls to the maintenance department, no technician was dispatched until the morning of May 10.
all.zh: 儘管我曾三度致電維修部門，卻直到 5 月 10 日早上才有技術人員前來處理。

all.en: In addition, the noise from ongoing renovation work on the adjacent floor began as early as 6:30 a.m. each day, which severely disrupted my preparation for important client meetings.
all.zh: 此外，鄰樓正在進行的整修工程每天早上 6 點 30 分就開始施工，嚴重干擾了我準備重要客戶會議的時間。

all.en: I was not informed of these renovations at the time of booking, nor was any notice posted in the room itself.
all.zh: 我在訂房時並未獲告知有此整修，房內也未張貼任何相關公告。

all.en: When I raised this concern with the duty manager on May 11, I was offered only a complimentary breakfast voucher, which I felt was an inadequate response given the circumstances.
all.zh: 當我於 5 月 11 日向值班經理反映此情況時，僅獲得一張免費早餐券，鑑於當時的情況，我認為此回應並不充分。

all.en: Furthermore, upon reviewing my final invoice, I noticed several billing discrepancies that require your immediate attention.
all.zh: 此外，在審閱最終帳單時，我發現多項計費上的差異，需要您立即處理。

all.en: I was charged twice for a single laundry service request and was also billed for two minibar items that I did not consume.
all.zh: 我被重複收取一筆送洗服務的費用，並被加收兩項我未曾使用的迷你吧商品費用。

all.en: The total amount of these incorrect charges comes to approximately 78 US dollars.
all.zh: 這些錯誤收費的總金額約為 78 美元。

all.en: I have attached a copy of the itemized bill, with the disputed entries clearly highlighted for your reference.
all.zh: 我已附上一份明細帳單副本，並將有爭議的項目清楚標示以供您參考。

all.en: Equally disappointing was the attitude of certain front-desk staff, who appeared dismissive when I attempted to discuss these matters in person.
all.zh: 同樣令人失望的是部分櫃台人員的態度，當我親自試圖討論這些問題時，他們顯得相當敷衍。

all.en: As a frequent business traveler, I rely on consistent and professional service in order to focus on the demands of my work.
all.zh: 身為一名經常出差的商務旅客，我依賴穩定且專業的服務，才能專注於工作上的需求。

all.en: Unfortunately, the cumulative effect of these issues has caused unnecessary stress and a negative impression of an otherwise reputable establishment.
all.zh: 可惜的是，上述問題累積的影響造成了不必要的壓力，並使我對這家原本聲譽良好的飯店留下負面印象。

all.en: In light of the above, I would respectfully request a refund of the disputed charges, as well as appropriate compensation for the inconvenience experienced.
all.zh: 鑑於上述情形，我謹此請求退還有爭議的費用，並就所造成的不便給予適當補償。

all.en: A partial credit toward a future stay or an upgrade on my next visit would also be acceptable forms of resolution.
all.zh: 未來入住的部分抵用金額或下次入住時的房型升等，亦為可接受的解決方式。

all.en: I would greatly appreciate a written response within ten business days outlining the steps your team intends to take.
all.zh: 懇請於十個工作天內以書面回覆，說明貴團隊預計採取的處理步驟，我將不勝感激。

all.en: Should you require any further information, I can be reached at the email address and phone number listed below.
all.zh: 若需任何進一步資訊，可透過下方所列的電子郵件地址及電話與我聯繫。

all.en: I sincerely hope that this matter can be resolved promptly so that I may continue to recommend your hotel to my colleagues and clients.
all.zh: 我衷心希望此事能盡速獲得解決，以便我能繼續向同事及客戶推薦貴飯店。

all.en: Thank you in advance for your attention to this matter.
all.zh: 感謝您事先撥冗處理此事。

all.en: Sincerely, Daniel Whitaker
all.zh: 此致敬意，丹尼爾·惠特克 敬上
